data.title: Battery X Metals Advances Y Lithium Project with NI 43-101 Report
data.description:
Battery X Metals ( (TSE:BATX) ) has shared an announcement.

Battery X Metals has filed an NI 43-101 Technical Report for its Y Lithium Project near Bailey Lake, Saskatchewan, as part of its 2025 critical battery metal exploration program. The project is strategically located within the Ennadai Greenstone Belt, highlighting the lithium potential of the region. A high-resolution LiDAR survey was completed, qualifying for an exploration expenditure credit, reducing the company’s required 2025 expenditures. This advancement underscores the company’s commitment to exploring high-potential lithium-bearing systems in Canada, potentially impacting its operations and positioning within the battery metals industry.

More about Battery X Metals

Battery X Metals Inc. is an energy transition resource exploration and technology company focused on advancing the battery metals sector. The company is involved in exploring prospective battery metal properties, developing proprietary recovery technologies for battery-grade materials, and creating software and hardware technology for extending the lifespan of lithium-ion and electric vehicle batteries.

Average Trading Volume: 117,216

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$12.2M

data.title: 4DS Memory Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting Amid Director Nomination Concerns
data.description:
4DS Memory ( (AU:4DS) ) has issued an update.

4DS Memory Limited has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for November 20, 2025, in West Perth, Australia. The company has received four unsolicited director nominations, which the board recommends shareholders vote against. Shareholders are encouraged to review the meeting materials online, as hard copies will not be distributed unless previously requested. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it involves crucial voting decisions that could impact the company’s governance and strategic direction.

More about 4DS Memory

4DS Memory Limited operates in the technology sector, focusing on the development and commercialization of non-volatile memory technology. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the code 4DS and is involved in advancing semiconductor technology solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 20,925,763

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$18.55M

data.title: Ichiyoshi Securities Reports Strong Earnings Growth for First Half of Fiscal 2025
data.description:
An announcement from Ichiyoshi Securities Co ( (JP:8624) ) is now available.

Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd. reported a significant increase in its preliminary consolidated earnings for the first half of fiscal 2025, with operating revenue rising by 9% and net income attributable to owners up by 23.5% compared to the same period in the previous year. This growth is attributed to the steady progress of its ‘Stock-Type Business Model,’ which led to increased operating revenue from stable-income sources such as beneficiary certificates and commissions.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8624) stock is a Hold with a Yen851.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ichiyoshi Securities Co stock, see the JP:8624 Stock Forecast page.

More about Ichiyoshi Securities Co

Ichiyoshi Securities Co., Ltd. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, primarily operating in the financial instruments trading industry. The company focuses on providing services such as fund-wrap accounts and investment trusts, which contribute to its stable-income sources.

Average Trading Volume: 104,459

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen26.45B

data.title: Rakuten Issues Unsecured Undated Bonds to Enhance Financial Flexibility
data.description:
Rakuten ( (JP:4755) ) has provided an announcement.

Rakuten Group, Inc. has announced the issuance of unsecured undated bonds with interest payment deferral and optional redemption clauses, structured to receive a 50% equity credit from rating agencies. The proceeds from these bonds will be used to redeem or repurchase existing USD-denominated subordinated notes, enhancing Rakuten’s financial flexibility and potentially strengthening its market position.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4755) stock is a Hold with a Yen850.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rakuten stock, see the JP:4755 Stock Forecast page.

More about Rakuten

Rakuten Group, Inc. is a prominent player in the e-commerce and internet services industry, offering a wide range of services including online retail, digital content, fintech, and communications. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and is known for its innovative approach to integrating technology and commerce.
